overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai in a yellow outfit riding a horse through golden grasslands toward a river, crossing the water, and continuing along a sandy bank with snow-capped mountains in the background during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland prairie with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: riding a horse at a steady canter through tall golden grass toward distant mountains

entered.detail: golden-brown tall grass covering the ground in all directions
large mountain with snow-covered peak dominating the horizon
dense trees with autumn foliage visible on the left horizon
thin column of dark smoke rising in the distant right background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassland prairie during golden hour. The camera follows a samurai on horseback riding through tall golden grass toward a distant snow-capped mountain. Sparse forests line the horizon and a thin smoke plume rises in the distance. The scene is serene and empty of other characters.

events.description: flock of white birds takes flight from the grass near the river
horse enters the shallow river water

agents.ego_description: approaching the river while riding through grass, preparing to cross

notable_agents.action: flock of white birds flying up from the riverside grass

entered.detail: blue-green river water becoming visible ahead
small traditional wooden structure visible on the left bank

segments.scene_description: The horse continues riding through grassland as a river comes into view ahead. A flock of white birds takes flight from the riverside. The camera approaches the water's edge where a small wooden hut sits on the left bank. The snow-capped mountain remains prominent in the background as the horse enters the river at the segment's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with rocky bottom

events.description: entered the Nupur River, water level at horse's legs

agents.ego_description: wading through the clear shallow river, navigating around submerged rocks

entered.detail: smooth stones and rocks visible beneath the clear water surface

segments.scene_description: The horse wades through the clear turquoise water of the Nupur River. The water is shallow, revealing smooth rocks on the riverbed. The snow-capped mountain continues to dominate the background while the horse moves steadily through the current toward the opposite bank.

events.description: exited the river onto a sandy gravel bank

agents.ego_description: riding along the sandy riverbank with the river flowing alongside

entered.detail: sandy and gravelly shore along the river's edge

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the horse rides along a sandy gravel bank. The river flows alongside to the right, with the snow-capped mountain still prominent ahead. The terrain is a mix of sand and scattered rocks, with patches of grass on the higher banks. The journey continues along this riverside path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a serene golden prairie that gradually leads toward a river crossing beneath towering peaks. It begins by tracking a samurai on horseback riding through tall golden grass, with sparse forests and a distant plume of smoke marking the horizon. As the horse advances toward a prominent snow-capped mountain, the open grassland begins to give way to the approaching riverside. The scene then shifts as a flock of white birds takes flight from the water's edge, passing a small wooden hut on the left bank. Finally, the camera follows the rider as they leave the prairie behind and enter the flowing river.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a horse transitions from wading through a river to riding along a rugged riverside bank. It begins with the horse moving steadily through the clear turquoise waters of the Nupur River, where the shallow current reveals smooth rocks on the riverbed. As the horse reaches the opposite shore, the scene shifts from the aquatic environment to a sandy gravel bank. The camera then tracks the journey along this riverside path, with the flowing water remaining to the right and patches of grass appearing on the higher banks. Throughout the entire movement, a prominent snow-capped mountain dominates the background, anchoring the landscape as the terrain transforms from water to land.
